title: Large Language Models for Automated Data Science: Introducing CAAFE for Context-Aware Automated Feature Engineering
search_query: Large Language Models for Automated Data Science: Introducing CAAFE for Context-Aware Automated Feature Engineering
notes: As the field of automated machine learning (AutoML) advances, it becomes increasingly important to incorporate domain knowledge into these systems. We present an approach for doing so by harnessing the power of large language models (LLMs). Specifically, we introduce Context-Awar...
